ticket.description:
This message issupport regarding our previous conversation about failure of lab generation. Previous assistants was given by Miss Priyanka Mukhia.
As per her suggestion, we have contacted with blue dart, But there is no response regarding this. We request you to Prioritise this error And get solution of this.
Regards,
Team Sonaura 

------------------

comments.body:
Hello SAMBHAV SHAH,

Good Day!

Checking the BlueDart API credentials you have added in the app for your account, they do not seem correct.

We can reach out to BlueDart team on your behalf for your case. Could you please add your BlueDart Account Representative to this thread so that we can reach out to them and check your case?

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

comments.body:
Request #384602 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #384602:

Hello SAMBHAV,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on s71z0b-yw.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Nisha,

Greetings from PluginHive!

One of our mutual customer https://www.sonaura.in is not able to generate the shipping labels using the Blue Dart account they have connected in the app.

The error returned is "User not authorized to register pickup for specified Area Customer code".

We have attached the Request/Response for your reference.

Could you please confirm if the below details provided are accurate?

Customer Code: 000001
Origin Area Service Code: 413709
Login ID: DY2458898
Shipping API Key: nulqkfjmhktmgjvnirkisruhfuttlgh5
Tracking API Key: pnpv0piufgnipewupq2nhhehtrm8tlps

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Nisha,
 
Greetings from PluginHive!
 
One of our mutual customer https://www.sonaura.in is not able to generate the shipping labels using the Blue Dart account they have connected in the app.
 
The error returned is "User not authorized to register pickup for specified Area Customer code".
 
We have attached the Request/Response for your reference.
 
Could you please confirm if the below details provided are accurate?
 
Customer Code: 000001
Origin Area Service Code: 413709
Login ID: DY2458898
Shipping API Key: nulqkfjmhktmgjvnirkisruhfuttlgh5
Tracking API Key: pnpv0piufgnipewupq2nhhehtrm8tlps
 
Looking forward to hearing from you.
 
Regards,
 
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
